title: Eduversal Principal Operating Cadence & Task Framework
description: A comprehensive operating cadence and task framework for principals across the Eduversal Indonesia partner network. The framework defines the daily, weekly, monthly, termly, and annual rhythm of principal practice, with each task anchored to (a) one of the eight foci of the Eduversal Principal Leadership Observation Guide, (b) the relevant Indonesian regulation or Cambridge requirement, and (c) a concrete evidence requirement. Designed to function as: (i) a self-managed checklist for principals, (ii) a coaching reference for the Academic Director, (iii) the data backbone for the Eduversal Principal Hub digital module, and (iv) an induction reference for newly appointed principals. Tasks are tagged by priority — compliance (legally or contractually required), core (essential to the role), or recommended (best practice).

parent_rubric.relationship: This cadence framework operationalises the eight foci (P1–P8) defined in the parent rubric. Each task here references a specific evidence indicator from the parent rubric, ensuring that observation findings and operating cadence are coherent and mutually reinforcing.

regulatory_alignment.title: Permendikbud Nomor 6 Tahun 2018 — Penugasan Guru sebagai Kepala Sekolah
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Defines the three core duties (tugas pokok) of the principal: managerial, entrepreneurial development, supervision.

regulatory_alignment.title: Permendiknas Nomor 13 Tahun 2007 — Standar Kepala Sekolah/Madrasah
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Defines five competency dimensions: personality, managerial, entrepreneurship, supervision, social.

regulatory_alignment.title: Permendikdasmen Nomor 7 Tahun 2025 — Penugasan Guru sebagai Kepala Sekolah
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Current regulation governing principal appointment, term length, allowance, and rotation. Replaces Permendikbudristek 40/2021.

regulatory_alignment.title: Permendikdasmen Nomor 11 Tahun 2025 — Pemenuhan Beban Kerja Guru
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Defines the 37 jam 30 menit per week workload framework that the principal manages for staff.

regulatory_alignment.title: Permendikdasmen Nomor 13 Tahun 2025 — Pendekatan Pembelajaran Mendalam
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Current curriculum framework: deep learning approach, 8 dimensi profil lulusan, Coding & AI as electives from Grades 5/7/10.

regulatory_alignment.title: Permendikbud Nomor 75 Tahun 2016 — Komite Sekolah
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Governs the role and meeting cadence of komite sekolah.

regulatory_alignment.title: Permendikbud Nomor 25 Tahun 2018 — Penerimaan Peserta Didik Baru
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Governs the annual student admission cycle (PPDB).

regulatory_alignment.title: PP 19/2005 jo. PP 13/2015 — Standar Nasional Pendidikan
regulatory_alignment.relevance: The eight national education standards (8 SNP).

regulatory_alignment.title: PP Nomor 17 Tahun 2025 — Perlindungan Anak di Ranah Digital
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Digital child protection obligations relevant to safeguarding.

regulatory_alignment.title: UU Nomor 20 Tahun 2003 — Sistem Pendidikan Nasional
regulatory_alignment.relevance: The constitutive law governing the national education system.

regulatory_alignment.title: Permendiknas Nomor 63 Tahun 2009 — Sistem Penjaminan Mutu Pendidikan
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Defines the quality assurance system — basis for EDS and Rapor Pendidikan.

regulatory_alignment.title: Cambridge International — Cambridge Handbook for Centres
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Centre approval criteria covering leadership, learning, safeguarding, examinations, and quality assurance.

regulatory_alignment.title: Eduversal Indonesia — Academic Standards & Partner School Performance Checklist
regulatory_alignment.relevance: Network-wide standards for partner schools, including weighted performance criteria.

daily.description: Tasks performed on every school day

weekly.description: Tasks performed once per school week

annually.description: Tasks performed once per academic year

adhoc.description: Event-triggered tasks (incident response, regulatory request, etc.)

priority_levels.compliance: Legally required by Indonesian regulation or contractually required by Cambridge International / Eduversal. Non-negotiable.
priority_levels.core: Essential to effective performance of the principal role. Strongly expected.
priority_levels.recommended: Best practice. Adopt where school context allows.

indonesian_calendar_anchors.anchor: Tahun ajaran baru begins; MPLS (Masa Pengenalan Lingkungan Sekolah) for new students; RKT/RKAS finalisation
Hari Kemerdekaan RI (17 Aug); RKAS implementation begins; Semester 1 fully underway
Mid-semester assessments; Cambridge Oct/Nov registration deadlines
Cambridge Oct/Nov exam series; Sumpah Pemuda (28 Oct); Semester 1 review window
Hari Pahlawan (10 Nov); end-of-Semester 1 assessments preparation
Semester 1 close; report distribution; Hari Ibu (22 Dec); winter recess
Semester 2 starts; Cambridge March/Feb registration; mid-year financial review
Mid-Semester 2 assessments; Cambridge May/June registration deadlines; Ramadhan window (variable)
Hari Kartini (21 Apr); Idul Fitri (variable); PPDB cycle begins for following year
Hari Pendidikan Nasional (2 May); Cambridge May/June exam series; end-of-year planning
Cambridge May/June exam series; end of Semester 2; kenaikan kelas; reports; year-end recess

cambridge_calendar_anchors.key_deadlines: Late August: standard entry deadline; Late September: late entry deadline
Mid October prior year: standard entry deadline
Late February: standard entry deadline; Late March: late entry deadline

eduversal_calendar_anchors.anchor: Annual School Leadership Alignment & Strategic Development Workshop
Annual Principal Appraisal cycle close; network year-end review

reference_documents.rkt_rkas: Rencana Kerja Tahunan & Rencana Kerja dan Anggaran Sekolah
reference_documents.rapor_pendidikan: National school report card platform — raporpendidikan.kemdikbud.go.id
reference_documents.dapodik: Data Pokok Pendidikan — operational student/staff data system
reference_documents.pmm: Platform Merdeka Mengajar — Pengelolaan Kinerja module
reference_documents.panduan_kerja_ks: Buku Panduan Kerja Kepala Sekolah (Kemendikbud, Direktorat Jenderal GTK)
reference_documents.walkthrough_rubric: Eduversal Classroom Walkthrough — Observation Guide v2.0
reference_documents.principal_rubric: Eduversal Principal Leadership Observation Guide v1.0

tasks.title: Daily leadership huddle
tasks.description: Brief stand-up with the senior leadership team (deputy principal, coordinators) to align on the day's priorities, surface emerging issues, and confirm coverage. Should be tightly time-boxed.
evidence_required: Brief daily log (date, attendees, top 3 priorities, flagged issues)
tasks.missed_threshold_action: If skipped, capture priorities asynchronously before 9:00.

tasks.title: Set weekly strategic priorities
tasks.description: Identify the top three school improvement priorities for the week ahead, mapped to the school's improvement plan, and communicate them to the leadership team in writing.
regulatory_anchor: Panduan Kerja Kepala Sekolah Bab II
evidence_required: Weekly priorities note (3 items, each tied to improvement plan goal)

tasks.title: Friday week reflection
tasks.description: End-of-week reflection capturing progress against the three priorities set on Monday, surprises encountered, and adjustments for next week. Forms the input for monthly RKAS variance review.
evidence_required: Weekly reflection log entry (linked to Monday priorities)

tasks.title: Monthly RKAS variance review
tasks.description: Review actual implementation against the planned RKAS for the month: which programmes ran, which slipped, which reallocations are needed. Document variance and rationale.
tasks.specific_timing: First week of the following month

tasks.title: Termly EDS review
tasks.description: Conduct or update the Evaluasi Diri Sekolah (EDS) review against the eight SNP. EDS findings inform the next term's RKAS and improvement plan.

tasks.title: Termly school improvement plan progress review
tasks.description: Review progress against measurable targets in the school improvement plan; identify which targets are on track, which are off track, and what corrective action is needed.

tasks.title: Annual RKT and RKAS preparation
tasks.description: Lead the preparation of the Rencana Kerja Tahunan and Rencana Kerja dan Anggaran Sekolah for the upcoming academic year, drawing on EDS findings, prior-year results, and Eduversal/Cambridge priorities.
evidence_required: RKAS document (signed by principal, komite, yayasan)

tasks.title: Annual visi-misi review
tasks.description: Lead a structured review of the school's vision, mission, and core values with the leadership team and yayasan. Confirm continued relevance or propose revision.
regulatory_anchor: Panduan Kerja Kepala Sekolah Bab II

tasks.title: Annual report to yayasan
tasks.description: Prepare and present a comprehensive annual report covering academic results, financial position, staff matters, infrastructure, and strategic outlook.

tasks.title: Annual Eduversal network strategic alignment
tasks.description: Participate in and act on the Eduversal annual leadership alignment workshop. Document the alignment between the school's plan and Eduversal network priorities.

tasks.title: Daily classroom presence
tasks.description: Be visibly present in classrooms, corridors, and learning spaces during transitions and at least once during a lesson period. Brief, informal — not a formal walkthrough.

tasks.title: Conduct two formal classroom walkthroughs
tasks.description: Conduct at least two formal classroom walkthroughs using the Eduversal Walkthrough Rubric. Each visit is 5–10 minutes, unannounced, with E/D/N coding and brief narrative comment. Findings shared with the teacher within 24 hours as developmental feedback.
evidence_required: Two walkthrough records in TAS with codes and notes
tasks.missed_threshold_action: If fewer than two walkthroughs in a given week, flag in Friday reflection and recover the following week.

tasks.title: Curriculum coordinator check-in
tasks.description: Brief weekly check-in with curriculum coordinators (Cambridge stage leads or subject leaders) to surface curriculum delivery issues, exam preparation status, and standardisation activities.

tasks.title: Monthly curriculum delivery review
tasks.description: Review curriculum delivery against scheme of work targets for each stage and subject. Identify gaps, slippage, and required interventions.

tasks.title: Monthly Cambridge progress review
tasks.description: Review Cambridge syllabus delivery progress, internal mock results, exam entry readiness, and any concerns flagged by Cambridge subject leaders. Cambridge Approved Centres only.

tasks.title: Termly internal moderation and standardisation
tasks.description: Lead or oversee internal moderation of student work and standardisation of teacher judgements, especially for Cambridge coursework where applicable.

tasks.title: Termly Cambridge syllabus review
tasks.description: Review Cambridge syllabus updates, examiner reports for the previous series, and any required adjustments to schemes of work. Cambridge Approved Centres only.
evidence_required: Updated schemes of work where required

tasks.title: Termly deep learning implementation review
tasks.description: Review implementation of Permendikdasmen 13/2025 deep learning approach across subjects: integrated topic linkages, 8 dimensi profil lulusan integration, and where applicable Coding & AI elective rollout.
regulatory_anchor: 8 SNP — Standar Isi, Standar Proses, Standar Kompetensi Lulusan

tasks.title: Annual curriculum mapping audit
tasks.description: Audit the alignment between national curriculum requirements (Standar Isi, Standar Proses, SKL), Cambridge syllabus requirements (where applicable), and the school's actual schemes of work.

tasks.title: Annual professional development plan tied to instructional priorities
tasks.description: Lead development of the annual PD plan, ensuring it is informed by walkthrough findings, appraisal data, and instructional priorities for the coming year.

tasks.title: Daily operational scan
tasks.description: Brief operational scan covering attendance (staff and students), incidents from the previous afternoon, urgent communications, and approval queue.

tasks.title: Approve essential daily decisions
tasks.description: Process and approve decisions in the principal's queue: leave requests, procurement under threshold, parent escalations, urgent timetable adjustments. Decisions deferred more than 48 hours flagged for review.

tasks.title: Weekly calendar finalisation
tasks.description: Confirm the week's calendar (events, meetings, visits, examinations), distribute to staff, and update parent-facing calendar where appropriate.

tasks.title: Weekly communications digest
tasks.description: Issue a weekly internal communications digest to all staff: priorities, calendar, recognitions, reminders. Reduces ad hoc messaging during the week.

tasks.title: Monthly RKAS execution review
tasks.description: Review actual versus planned RKAS expenditure for the month with the bendahara. Document variances and approved reallocations.

tasks.title: Monthly facilities and sarpras inspection
tasks.description: Walk and inspect facilities (classrooms, labs, library, sanitation, sports facilities, ICT). Log condition, maintenance needs, and procurement implications.

tasks.title: Monthly staffing and workload review
tasks.description: Review staffing levels, leave patterns, and workload distribution (37 jam 30 menit per Permendikdasmen 11/2025). Identify gaps and recruitment needs.

tasks.title: Monthly Dapodik sync verification
tasks.description: Verify that Dapodik data (student records, staff records, school profile) is current and accurate. Schedule update with operator if discrepancies found.

tasks.title: Termly master timetable review
tasks.description: Review master timetable for compliance with curriculum hours, teacher workload (37 jam 30 menit), room utilisation, and student learning load.

tasks.title: Termly financial close
tasks.description: Lead the termly financial close: reconciliation, reporting to yayasan, and preparation of next-term cash flow projection.

tasks.title: Annual budget preparation
tasks.description: Lead preparation of the annual budget within the RKAS framework, including capital expenditure proposals, programme budgets, and contingency allocations.

tasks.title: Annual sarpras inventory
tasks.description: Conduct or oversee a complete physical inventory of school facilities, equipment, ICT, and learning resources. Reconcile against the asset register.

tasks.title: Annual emergency procedures rehearsal
tasks.description: Lead an annual rehearsal of emergency procedures: fire, earthquake, lockdown, medical emergency. Review evacuation routes and assembly points.
tasks.specific_timing: Within first month of academic year
evidence_required: Drill report with date, attendance, and observations

tasks.title: Daily dashboard scan
tasks.description: Quick scan of key dashboards: attendance (student and staff), incidents, parent communications, and any leading indicators flagged.

tasks.title: Friday data review
tasks.description: Structured weekly data review covering walkthrough findings, formative assessment data, attendance, incidents, and any flagged metrics. Document key insights and any required action.

tasks.title: Monthly EASE / internal assessment data review
tasks.description: Review EASE assessment data and internal formative assessment results. Identify subjects, year groups, or cohorts requiring intervention.

tasks.title: Monthly stakeholder feedback scan
tasks.description: Review aggregated stakeholder feedback (parent communications, suggestion channels, incident reports, social media mentions). Surface patterns and decide whether intervention is needed.

tasks.title: Termly Cambridge results analysis
tasks.description: After each Cambridge results release, conduct a structured analysis by subject and grade distribution. Identify strengths, areas for development, and implications for teaching. Cambridge Approved Centres only.

tasks.title: Termly Rapor Pendidikan engagement
tasks.description: Engage with the most recent Rapor Pendidikan release: review school performance against national indicators, identify priority areas, and document planned interventions.

tasks.title: Termly stakeholder satisfaction touchpoint
tasks.description: Run a structured satisfaction touchpoint (survey, focus group, or both) with parents, staff, and students. Use Eduversal-standard instruments where available.

tasks.title: Annual comprehensive QA report
tasks.description: Compile the school's annual quality assurance report covering all data domains: academic outcomes, EASE, Rapor Pendidikan, satisfaction surveys, walkthrough patterns, and incident trends.

tasks.title: Daily visible support to staff
tasks.description: Be visibly available and supportive to staff during the day: brief greetings, checking on staff who flagged concerns, and acknowledging effort. Distinct from formal supervision.

tasks.title: Weekly 1:1 with rotating staff member
tasks.description: Hold a substantive 1:1 with a different staff member each week — not for performance review but for connection, feedback, and staff voice. Rotate through all staff over the semester.

tasks.title: Monthly PMM / Pengelolaan Kinerja update
tasks.description: Verify and approve staff entries on the PMM Pengelolaan Kinerja platform. Address any flags or queries from teachers.

tasks.title: Monthly PD progress review
tasks.description: Review staff progress against the annual PD plan: who has attended, what was learned, what needs follow-up.

tasks.title: Monthly mentoring pair check-in
tasks.description: Verify that mentoring pairs (typically newly qualified teachers paired with senior teachers) are meeting and progressing. Address any concerns.

tasks.title: Termly TAS observation cycle
tasks.description: Lead and oversee the termly Teacher Appraisal System cycle: pre-observation conversations, observations, post-observation conversations, and action planning.

tasks.title: Termly PKG / SKP milestone
tasks.description: Confirm PKG (Penilaian Kinerja Guru) or SKP entries reach termly milestone: targets set, progress recorded, evidence uploaded.

tasks.title: Termly staff wellbeing check
tasks.description: Review staff wellbeing indicators: retention, absence patterns, satisfaction survey results. Identify any individual or systemic concerns and act.

tasks.title: Annual staff appraisal close-out
tasks.description: Close out annual appraisal cycle for all staff: conversations completed, ratings agreed where applicable, development plans for next year drafted.

tasks.title: Annual recruitment cycle
tasks.description: Lead annual recruitment for the following academic year: needs analysis, vacancy postings, interviewing, selection, induction planning.

tasks.title: Annual induction programme for new staff
tasks.description: Design and deliver a structured induction programme for new staff members: school context, curriculum, systems, expectations, mentoring assignment.

tasks.title: Daily presence at gate or lobby
tasks.description: Be visibly present at the school gate or main lobby at start or end of day to greet parents and students. Builds relationship and surfaces concerns early.

tasks.title: Weekly parent communication digest
tasks.description: Issue a weekly communication to parents covering key events, reminders, recognitions, and one short reflection from the principal. Keep tone warm and concise.

tasks.title: Weekly response to parent escalations
tasks.description: Address all parent escalations that reach the principal's queue within 48 hours: acknowledgement, investigation, response.

tasks.title: Monthly Komite Sekolah meeting
tasks.description: Hold or attend the monthly meeting of the Komite Sekolah. Share school news, hear committee input, document decisions.

tasks.title: Monthly yayasan report
tasks.description: Submit the monthly report to the yayasan covering academic, operational, financial, and compliance highlights, plus any matters requiring board attention.

tasks.title: Monthly Eduversal network reporting
tasks.description: Submit monthly check-in to Eduversal central per the network reporting calendar: KPIs, flagged issues, support requests.

tasks.title: Termly parent forum or town hall
tasks.description: Hold an in-person or hybrid parent forum once per semester: principal updates, Q&A, and an opportunity for parent voice on school priorities.

tasks.title: Termly community partnership review
tasks.description: Review existing partnerships (universities, NGOs, businesses, alumni) and explore new ones aligned to curriculum and student opportunities.

tasks.title: Annual stakeholder engagement report
tasks.description: Compile an annual report on stakeholder engagement: parent communications, komite engagement, yayasan reporting, partnerships, alumni activity.

tasks.title: Annual alumni event
tasks.description: Host an annual alumni gathering: reconnection, mentorship opportunities for current students, and feedback on graduate destinations.

tasks.title: Daily safeguarding scan
tasks.description: Brief daily check on safeguarding: visitor logs, any incidents reported, status of any open safeguarding concerns.

tasks.title: Weekly compliance correspondence review
tasks.description: Review any new correspondence from dinas pendidikan, BAN-SM, Cambridge International, or other regulators. Triage urgency and assign actions.

tasks.title: Monthly safeguarding meeting
tasks.description: Hold a monthly safeguarding meeting with the designated safeguarding lead and key staff: review open cases, refresh procedures, identify training needs.

tasks.title: Monthly Cambridge Centre file maintenance
tasks.description: Update the Cambridge Centre file: any policy changes, incident logs, examination preparation status, staff certification records. Cambridge Approved Centres only.

tasks.title: Monthly accreditation file maintenance
tasks.description: Update accreditation (BAN-SM) readiness file: evidence collection against accreditation standards, gap analysis, action items.

tasks.title: Termly safeguarding training refresh
tasks.description: Run a termly safeguarding training refresh for all staff: signs of concern, reporting procedures, digital safeguarding (PP 17/2025), Cambridge expectations.

tasks.title: Annual safeguarding policy review
tasks.description: Lead annual review of the safeguarding policy: alignment with PP 17/2025, Cambridge expectations, and any incidents from the past year. Approve revised policy with yayasan.

tasks.title: Annual operational license verification
tasks.description: Verify that all operational licenses (izin operasional, NPSN, accreditation status) are current. Initiate renewal processes well in advance of expiry.
tasks.specific_timing: Within first quarter of academic year

tasks.title: Annual data protection review
tasks.description: Review school data protection practices for student records, parent contacts, staff records, and digital systems against PP 17/2025 and best practice.

tasks.title: PPDB cycle leadership
tasks.description: Lead the annual Penerimaan Peserta Didik Baru cycle in compliance with Permendikbud 25/2018 and local dinas regulations.

tasks.title: Punctual arrival and visible start
tasks.description: Arrive before the start of the school day, present and visible. Sets the standard for the institution.

tasks.title: Daily reflective close
tasks.description: End-of-day brief reflection (3 minutes): what went well today, what surprised me, one thing to do differently tomorrow. Captured in a personal log.

tasks.title: Weekly leadership reading
tasks.description: Read at least one piece of relevant leadership or educational content per week (article, chapter, case study). Briefly note one takeaway.

tasks.title: Monthly personal PD activity
tasks.description: Engage in one structured personal PD activity per month: peer observation in another school, podcast, course module, professional reading group.

tasks.title: Termly self-assessment against rubric
tasks.description: Complete a structured self-assessment against the eight foci of the Principal Leadership Observation Guide. Surface strengths and growth areas.

tasks.title: Annual 360° feedback cycle
tasks.description: Participate in the annual 360° feedback cycle: receive feedback from staff, parents, students, and yayasan against the rubric foci. Reflect and respond with a personal growth plan.
evidence_required: Personal growth plan for following year

tasks.title: Annual personal growth plan
tasks.description: Document a personal growth plan for the upcoming year: 2–3 specific development goals, planned activities, and accountability measures.
evidence_required: Personal growth plan (shared with Academic Director)

tasks.title: Safeguarding incident response
tasks.description: On any safeguarding concern, follow the safeguarding incident procedure: secure the child, log the concern, escalate per policy, contact authorities where required, document fully. Confidential channel.

tasks.title: Crisis or critical incident response
tasks.description: On a crisis (medical emergency, facility incident, security concern, public health event): activate the crisis plan, communicate with staff/parents/yayasan/dinas as appropriate, document, debrief.

tasks.title: Regulatory inspection or visit
tasks.description: On a dinas pendidikan, BAN-SM, or Cambridge inspection / visit: prepare evidence, host the visit, follow up on action items.
evidence_required: Visit file (notice, agenda, evidence pack, follow-up actions)

tasks.title: Eduversal Academic Director appraisal visit hosting
tasks.description: When Eduversal conducts a school appraisal visit, host the Academic Director: prepare evidence, schedule observations and conversations, walk the school, and engage in the post-visit reflection.

intended_platforms: Eduversal Teachers Hub (teachershub.eduversal.org) — read-only mirror for staff
principal_app_modules: Evidence inbox (where evidence is uploaded against tasks)
